reasoning: The market priced DeepSeek hitting the top spot at 1% on Oct 30, 2025. While DeepSeek released an "experimental" mid-generation model in Sept 2025 and introduced an updated version in Nov 2025, there are no reliable indicators that it has the sheer capability to beat frontier models and take the outright #1 spot on Chatbot Arena by the end of December. Due to the intense competition and historical precedent of proprietary models holding #1, coupled with the extremely low market estimate, the true chance is very small. I am assigning a 5% probability, adhering to the lower bound constraints.
